Package.Name: Scripting
Package.Summary: Compare bounded JavaScript, C#, and Python adapters through one engine-neutral runner.

Sandbox.Title: Multi-engine scripting sandbox
Sandbox.EditorFallback: Monaco is unavailable; the bounded text editor remains active.
Sandbox.SourceLengthExceeded: {0:N0} / {1:N0} characters — shorten the script before running.

Result.Title: Execution result
Result.Empty: Run the current source to inspect its value or safe failure.

Tips.Title: What to notice
Tips.Isolation: Each run uses fresh engine or child-process state.
Tips.Bounds: Only limits reported by the selected adapter are requested.
Tips.Failures: Validation and execution failures expose safe diagnostics only.
Tips.Capabilities: C# and Python run only when explicitly enabled and available in the deployment.

Purpose.Title: Purpose
Purpose.Body: Pocok.Scripting separates engine-neutral orchestration from language adapters.

QuickStart.Title: Quick start
QuickStart.Body: Choose an engine and run the equivalent sample.

Bounds.Title: Execution bounds
Bounds.Body: The runner validates before execution and rejects unsupported mandatory limits.

Production.Title: Production notes
Production.Body: Validators and child processes are guardrails, not an operating-system sandbox. Public demos need strict source, output, timeout, queue, and client-rate limits and must not contain secrets.

Boundaries.Title: Boundaries
Boundaries.Guardrails: Validation is fail-closed guardrail logic, not an OS sandbox.
Boundaries.NoIo: Filesystem, network, reflection, process, and environment access are denied by default.
Boundaries.Trusted: C# and Python require explicit deployment opt-in and tightly bounded, secret-free hosting.
Boundaries.Bounded: Source, output, timeout, and supported engine limits are bounded.

Source.Title: Source documentation
Source.Body: Package documentation for engine contracts, adapters, validation, and trust boundaries.

arithmetic.Name: Arithmetic
arithmetic.Description: Return the same triangular-number result in all languages.

object-result.Name: Structured result
object-result.Description: Return an equivalent object and list shape.

missing-result.Name: Missing result
missing-result.Description: Require a result from source that only declares a value.

bounded-runaway.Name: Bounded runaway
bounded-runaway.Description: Trigger timeout or an engine execution bound.

validator-rejection.Name: Validator rejection
validator-rejection.Description: Request a prohibited engine-specific capability and stop before execution.
